item.title: Rising corporate profits, falling wages drive K-shaped economy
item.description: If you aren't yet familiar with the term "K-shaped economy," it will become inescapable in 2026, according to a new report from Bank of America. A K-s...

item.title: Kohl’s makes bold store change to lure back customers
item.description: Kohl’s rolls out a bold new in-store section across all locations to draw back shoppers amid ongoing challenges.

item.title: The surprising reason workers are cashing out 401(k)s early
item.description: As prices climb and paychecks feel thinner, a growing number of younger workers are making early 401(k) withdrawals, cracking open the one retirement ...

item.title: Veteran analyst drops a shocker on Cisco
item.description: Cisco (CSCO) should be on cloud nine right now. The software giant posted another strong quarter. Everything, on a fundamental level, is going well: r...
